productDisplayName: Puma Men Ikonis Black Sports Shoes
description: Get used to superior comfort and performance during your run with these Ikonis 2 shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you do to help you run better and look great doing it. Team these with jeans and tees for a casual look when you're not out training. Upper Synthetic leather upper with mesh overlays for a high degree of breathability and stability Formstripe and cat logo on one side for added comfort and style Lace-ups for snug Fit Midsole EVA midsole for absolute cushioning and improved shock absorption OrthoLite sockliner for more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Outsole ArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Long-lasting CELL unit in the heel for improved shock absorption EverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole, to provide durability in high-wear areas Aggressive pattern with flex grooves and a decoupled heel for enhanced flexibility of the feet shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
